subtitle: AI Transformation Advisor -- Workflow Design | Generative AI | Enterprise Advisory
summary_text: Technology executive and AI transformation practitioner with 14-year enterprise CTO tenure and active consulting practice focused on generative and agentic AI adoption. Built and deployed a structured AI architecture evaluation framework for a national CX consulting firm -- scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and capability taxonomy mapping AI features against platform requirements -- adopted by the firm to streamline vendor recommendations. At Money Management International, directed enterprise contact center AI transformation including intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, and integrated knowledge systems, with zero service disruption on go-live. Hands-on with Claude, GitHub Copilot, and AI-assisted development workflows. Published thinking on AI/automation distinctions, workflow governance, and reflexive AI use at linkedin.com/in/daniel-m-levine.

bullets: Built a structured AI architecture evaluation framework for a national CX consulting firm: scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and capability taxonomy mapping generative AI platform strengths against enterprise contact center workflow requirements; adopted by the firm to streamline vendor recommendation processes.

Designed repeatable methodology for comparing generative and agentic AI architectures across enterprise CC platforms and AI-focused startups, with primary emphasis on enterprise suitability, integration patterns, and capability-to-workflow fit.

Provide solution architecture guidance and pre-sales technical expertise on AI platform evaluation, vendor selection, and execution decisions for contact center and customer communications environments.

Directed enterprise-wide contact center AI transformation: designed hybrid architecture integrating enterprise CC platform with specialized AI vendors for intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, and integrated knowledge bots -- zero service disruption on go-live.

Led structured workflow analysis across digital, voice, and back-office channels to identify automation opportunities, quantify impact, and develop executive-ready recommendations; drove 200%+ increase in SEO and digital acquisition performance through target-state redesign.

Facilitated stakeholder workshops aligning 12+ executive and operations stakeholders on transformation priorities, using a multi-factor ROI x satisfaction x efficiency x equity prioritization model to govern sprint-over-sprint workstream decisions.

Developed executive presentations, board-ready narratives, and governance playbooks for major transformation workstreams spanning cloud migration, SDLC modernization, platform rebuild, and AI enablement.

Doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% year-over-year through SDLC modernization; stood up ePMO achieving 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence.
Founded and scaled a technology consulting firm over 17 years delivering web development, CMS architecture, and IT advisory services with full P&L ownership.
Architected and launched a proprietary commercial-grade CMS serving dozens of content-driven client websites; built and scaled multiple independent revenue streams.
